violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of residue. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024

The door to the outside, located in the dining room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk in door handle in the basement has a thick accumulation of debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024
The floor and wall junctures by the new hand sink do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024

The walls in the new hand sink area are constructed of drywall. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024

Some fixtures in the basement such as pipes and junction boxes have an accumulation of soil residue and old debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024

Burgers are served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
The beverage unit was not in good repair, nonfunctional during inspeciton. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the area beneath the flattop grill have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. The top of the basement water heater has an accumulation of dust and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024

The walls around the basement hand sink are constructed of poured concrete. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024

The cross pieces of wood on basement storage area walls has an accumulation of old rodent droppings, dust, and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024

The floors have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris, especially in the area near the dishwasher. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024

The floor and wall junctures in areas of the kitchen and basement do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
